description: Qwen-only residual classifier. Logistic regression on (response_emb - qwen_emb) (768-dim). Direct Qwen-provider counterpart to setup103 (Gemini). Needed to separate provider quality from dual-provider effect: if setup103 (Gemini) and setup119 (Qwen) perform similarly, the two providers are interchangeable in the delta space; if one is stronger, that provider should be preferred in setup113/114. Frozen encoder, no fine-tuning.
